Erika Kirk has forgiven her husband, and father of her children's killer. This is disgusting. It's neither courageous, nor virtuous, just vile. Offering absolution to a politically motivated murderer, Erika Kirk just sent a message to the world that we are weak. There is a time to forgive, and a time to forego it. This was the latter.

Nothing in excess, and forgiveness cannot be doled out so haphazardly that offering solace and tolerance to those who want us dead becomes dogmatic. And yes, forgiveness is a form of tolerance, as it grants those who have wronged us mercy. It's weakness, especially when given someone who is not is seeking it and would likely reject it.  

Has Robinson showed remorse, falling to his knees and begging for the Lord's mercy? No, of course not but let's just forgive the cold blooded unrepentant mutant fucker, because "that's what Jesus would do". Okay, so you want to be like Jesus, why don't you climb up on that cross and I'll grab the hammer. 

Imagine marrying a woman, knowing that should you be executed in front of your children, she would go on stage at your memorial with over two hundred thousand people and announce on national television not two weeks after you execution that she forgives the monster who did it. Logically, this also implies that she forgives all of those who danced on her husband's grave following his extremely gory demise. Wow, stunning and brave... 

This kind of unmitigated forgiveness only emboldens the enemy. Whether we want to admit it or not she just endangered her children's lives, as well ours as well. This is suicidal Christianity, and it must be vehemently rejected at all costs.
